question:
Will Volkan Oezdemir win by KO or TKO?

Description: This market will resolve to "Yes" if Volkan Oezdemir defeats Alonzo Menifield at UFC Fight Night: Tsarukyan vs. Hooker, scheduled for November 22, 2025, by KO or TKO, including referee stoppage, doctor stoppage, or corner stoppage. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No."

If the fight ends in a draw or by disqualification (either fighter), it will resolve "No."

If the bout is ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond December 6, 2025, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

Resolution source: https://www.ufc.com/events

evidences.title: Volkan Oezdemir vs Alonzo Menifield Pick, 11/22/2025 Predictions UFC Qatar Odds
evidences.content: Volkan "No Time" Oezdemir will be looking to add a win to his record of 20-8-0. The 36-year-old weighs in at 205 lbs and comes in at 6'2". The orthodox fighter extends his reach 75". Alonzo "Atomic" Menifield measures in at 6'0" and is fighting at 205 lbs. The orthodox fighter comes into this bout with a mark of 17-5-1. The 38-year-old has an arm span of 76". When talking about significant strikes, Volkan Oezdemir lands 4.95 per minute and Alonzo Menifield is connecting on 3.79 significant strikes per min. Oezdemir is landing 48% of the significant strikes he throws and Menifield connects on 53%. Regarding defending in the cage, "No Time" takes 4.22 significant strikes per min while "Atomic" absorbs 3.76. Oezdemir also defends 55% of the significant strikes his opponents throw at him and [...] Concerning wrestling, Volkan Oezdemir is the not as competent as a grappler as he gets a takedown 0.50 times per 3 rds. Oezdemir is taking his opponents to the canvas on 29% of his attempts and defending 80% of all takedowns attempted by his opposition. Menifield is scoring a takedown on 31% of the takedowns he tries and is defending 78% of all takedowns attempted by his opposition. In ter...

evidences.title: Prediction, pick for Volkan Oezdemir vs. Alonzo Menifield at UFC Qatar
evidences.content: DKNetwork Logo DKNetwork Logo Prediction, pick for Volkan Oezdemir vs. Alonzo Menifield at UFC Qatar # Prediction, pick for Volkan Oezdemir vs. Alonzo Menifield at UFC Qatar Published: November 22, 2025 By: Ryan Wohl The fourth fight of this week’s UFC Fight Night is a Light Heavyweight contest between Volkan Oezdemir vs. Alonzo Menifield. This is Oezdemir’s first fight since November 2024 and is attempting to get back in the win column for the first time in the last 17 months (June 2024). Menifield is riding a two-fight winning streak as he recently beat Oumar Sy in June. Check out my prediction for Volkan Oezdemir vs. Alonzo Menifield at UFC Qatar. ## Volkan Oezdemir to Win by KO/TKO/DQ or Submission (+100) [...] Oezdemir, 36, is a former UFC title challenger and is an eight-year UFC veteran. He is coming off a loss to Carlos Ulberg, but won two consecutive fights before that. His opponent, Menifield, is a two-year-old but is on a two-fight winning streak. Menifield is 2-0 in 2025 with wins over Julius Walker and Oumar Sy. On DraftKings Sportsbook, Oezdemir is a -225 favorite with Menifeld being a +185 underdog. This fight has an over/under of 2.5 rounds, with the under at -14...

In his last outing, "No Time" was on the wrong side of a unanimous decision against Carlos Ulberg last November. That result halted the momentum of back-to-back wins over Bogdan Guskov and Johnny Walker. Menifield (17-5-1 MMA, 10-5-1 UFC) has turned in a strong 2025 campaign so far. evidences.title: Oezdemir vs Menifield Prediction 11/22/25 UFC Fight Night 265
evidences.content: Menifield brings the power edge and slightly better efficiency numbers, but his lower output can create close rounds if he doesn’t land big moments. He’ll need to either pressure early or create exchanges that disrupt Oezdemir’s rhythm. The concern from a betting angle is whether Menifield’s pace holds up if Oezdemir drags him into a longer fight. The shorter average fight time suggests Menifield hasn’t consistently gone deep against opponents who keep steady pressure without brawling. The odds at Oezdemir -240 reflect a belief in the favorite’s consistency. Menifield at +195 gives you underdog value if you’re banking on power striking and round-stealing moments. It’s a classic spot where the favorite has the steadier metrics and the underdog holds the puncher’s path. [...] Based strictly on styles, stats, and recent trends — and without making any guarantees — the steadier round-to-round approach appears slightly more reliable. ### Free Pick: Volkan Oezdemir -240 This fight matters for the light heavyweight picture because both guys sit in that middle zone where one strong win can set up a surge. Bettors should keep an eye on line movement during fight week, especially if eithe...

evidences.title: Volkan Oezdemir vs. Alonzo Menifield prediction, odds, pick for UFC Qatar
evidences.content: Menifield, much like his opponent, sports one-punch knockout ability, but he hasn't earned a KO/TKO win since 2022. Instead, Menifield has approached his last few fights in a very measured approach, allowing his opponents to make the first mistake before looking to capitalize. With his explosive athletic ability, look for Menifield to be a constant threat throughout this fight. Opposite of Oezdemir, Menifield lands at a more accurate clip (53%) and absorbs less strikes (3.76) per minute as well. This fight will be about measuring up to his opponent and feinting until he can find the perfect time to open up with a combination. If Menifield can land cleanly with a few punches, he should be able to put Oezdemir on the ropes at some point. [...] Oezdemir will be most dangerous during the opening minutes of this fight as his last two wins have come inside the first round. This is a testament to his one-punch knockout power, but Oezdemir does an even better job at countering and defending initial strikes coming back his way at a 55% rate. If Menifield isn't perfect with his strikes from range, Oezdemir will be waiting for the perfect opening to explode and finish the fight. Oezdemir a...

evidences.title: UFC Qatar main card odds, breakdowns and predictions | X-Factor | MMA Mania
evidences.content: Wrestling is probably his best bet here, because Oezdemir historically is quite durable, hits very hard himself, and is the sharper technical striker. Menifield’s best chance is to make this a physical and exhausting wrestling match, which will leave both men incapable of knocking the other out. He’s a big 205-pounder with underrated conditioning, so it is possible … if not likely. Menifield’s defense is too porous to safely take on Oezdemir. Likely, he’ll get some clinch time but get smashed from close quarters or clipped as he tries to press forward another time. Generally, Oezdemir has only lost to true Top 10 talent, and Menifield isn’t really that guy. ##### Prediction: Oezdemir via knockout ### Related Return Of Canelo Hands? Bold Belal Promises He’ll Outbox Garry [...] Light Heavyweight: Volkan Oezdemir (-250) vs. Alonzo Menifield (+190)Best Win for Oezdemir? Johnny Walker For Menifield? Dustin Jacoby Current Streak: Oezdemir lost his last bout, whereas Menifield has won two in a row X-Factor: Both men are serious knockout threats How these two match up: This bout ends quickly or is a grueling wrestling match — there’s no in-between. [...] You can trust that “No Time” wil...

evidences.title: UFC Fight Night 265: Volkan Oezdemir vs Alonzo Menifield Preview & Prediction - The Stats Zone
evidences.content: Even though he’s coming off a loss to surging contender Carlos Ulberg, that setback has aged well given Ulberg’s current momentum. At 36, Oezdemir remains one of the most polished and dangerous early-round finishers in the division. He carries far superior striking fundamentals, a tighter guard, and cleaner shot selection than most of the division’s mid-ranked opponents. Against fighters who hesitate, slow down, or offer openings—traits Menifield has shown recently—Volkan thrives. With his durability still holding up and his experience in high-level firefights, this matchup plays strongly into his strengths. #### Alonzo Menifield: American powerhouse whose style has shifted after costly knockouts [...] Volkan “No Time” Oezdemir (20-8), representing Switzerland, returns to the Octagon as the #9 ranked light heavyweight and one of the most experienced strikers in the division. A former title challenger, Oezdemir has faced the absolute elite at 205—Daniel Cormier, Jiri Procházka, Magomed Ankalaev, Nikita Krylov, and Aleksandar Rakić—and has consistently proven he can compete at the highest level. His game is built around sharp boxing, clean technical striking, and genuine fight-end...

evidences.title: Volkan Oezdemir vs. Alonzo Menifield | We Want Picks
evidences.content: We Want Picks Become A Member ## Volkan Oezdemir vs. Alonzo Menifield EZDEMIR VS MENIFIELD This is a fun matchup between two aging vets. They are actually very similar in style with both of them having above average striking, above average power and below average wrestling. Alonzo is certainly the more powerful guy with Volkan being cleaner and having better cardio. I'll be rooting for Alonzo here but the pick will be Volkan. The leg kicks he had in the Ulberg fight combined with the stalking pressure will work well for him here. Alonzo loses his power backing up and as long as Volkan keeps the chin tucked, he should win a decision here. #### Volkan Oezdemir [...] #### Volkan Oezdemir Volkan Oezdemir is a forward pressure striker with power and volume. He throws his hands hard and throws them often. Volkan has a miserable takedown accuracy at only 29% which can be an issue because if he is losing the striking exchanges, his chin can't keep him in the fight and neither can the wrestling. He is 7-8 in the UFC with a mixed bag of competition but one thing is for sure and its that all of his losses are to quality people like Jiri, Cormier, Ankalaev and most recently Carlos Ulberg wh...

evidences.title: Volkan Oezdemir | 'No Time' Like The Present - UFC.com
evidences.content: Oezdemir will take on fellow ranked light heavyweight Alonzo Menifield on the main card in Doha, Qatar, where he plans on claiming a statement victory to kick-start a charge back up the division. Saturday's Full Fight Card Preview "It's a good fight, good matchup for me," he told UFC.com during his fight-week interview. "My goal, obviously, is to climb the rankings. I didn't get somebody ranked over me. But of course, this is a good opponent." Volkan Oezdemir reacts after his knockout victory against Johnny Walker in a light heavyweight fight during the UFC Fight Night event at Kingdom Arena on June 22, 2024 in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. (Photo by Chris Unger/Zuffa LLC) [...] Oezdemir's latest test sees him facing seasoned opposition in the form of Menifield, who arrives in Doha on a 2-fight win streak, courtesy of decision victories over Julius Walker and Oumar Sy. His training camp for the fight was a little different this time around, with Oezdemir making use of his brand-new gym facility, No Time MMA, in his hometown of Fribourg, Switzerland, which served as his training base for the main portion of his camp. Must See Moments: Volkan Oezdemir fight pass logo [...] Must See Moment...

evidences.title: Volkan Oezdemir vows to make a statement against Alonzo Menifield at UFC Qatar, eyes Jamahal Hill next | BJPenn.com
evidences.content: “I was really hoping to fight Blachowicz,” Oezdemir said. “It’s something that needs to be done for the European fans, for the people around me. I think that is very good, a very exciting one as well. The UFC decided differently, so I took on Alonzo Menifield. … “He’s been at the gates of the top-15 for a long time, but has never really pushed through it. He wants to test himself against me, and that’s not a smart idea. I will gladly show him that.” ### Volkan Oezdemir plans to make a statement at UFC Qatar As Oezdemir said, his plan is to show Menifield there are levels to this sport and division, and he is above him. Oezdemir knows Menifield has some knockout power, but other than that, the Swiss fighter is confident he will get his hand raised and by stoppage. [...] TofG Logo Home » MMA News » Volkan Oezdemir » Volkan Oezdemir vows to make a statement against Alonzo Menifield… # Volkan Oezdemir vows to make a statement against Alonzo Menifield at UFC Qatar, eyes Jamahal Hill next By Cole Shelton - November 18, 2025 at 3:35 PM PST // 0 Comments Trending: Dustin Poirier receives support from fellow UFC veteran amid arrest: “Some of us need to fight” Volkan Oezdemir is finally m...

evidences.title: Official Weigh-In Results | UFC Qatar | UFC
evidences.content: UFC Qatar airs at a special time: prelims get underway at 10am ET / 7pm PT from ABHA Arena in Doha, Qatar. Main card action begins at 1pm ET / 10am PT. The entire card can be viewed on ESPN+ in the United States. Main event scheduled for five rounds. All other bouts scheduled for three rounds. Official weigh-in results included Volkan Oezdemir (206) vs. Alonzo Menifield (206) in a light heavyweight bout.

evidences.title: Fight By Fight Preview | UFC Qatar
evidences.content: Marek Bujlo vs Denzel Freeman: Heavyweight newcomers kick things off in Qatar as Bujlo, 6-0 with a 100-percent finishing rate split between T/KOs and submissions, meets Freeman, a 6-1 former WWE hopeful and U.S. Marine coming off consecutive stoppage wins. The card is headlined by Arman Tsarukyan vs. Dan Hooker, with Belal Muhammad vs. Ian Machado Garry also featured.
